vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng, thưởng ngoạn (để hiểu và cảm nhận)
vocab.example: I love to sit on the gallery benches and just take in the sheer beauty of the oil paintings.
Whenever I'm in the city center, I try to pop into the contemporary art space to see what's new.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật lên (một đặc điểm, ý nghĩa)
vocab.example: The clever use of lighting in the gallery really brings out the textures of the sculptures.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng với sự kinh ngạc, thán phục
vocab.example: Visitors often stand still for minutes just to marvel at the intricate details of the Renaissance pieces.
Art galleries provide a quiet space to reflect on the artist's message and historical context.

vocab.meaning: tìm hiểu sâu, nghiên cứu kỹ
vocab.example: I used the audio guide to dig into the background story of the avant-garde movement.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ thấy, bắt gặp (một tác phẩm/nghệ sĩ)
vocab.example: I came across a local artist’s work in a small gallery that I ended up absolutely loving.

vocab.meaning: lùi lại phía sau (để nhìn bao quát)
vocab.example: You need to stand back from those large-scale installations to truly appreciate their impact.

vocab.meaning: xem xét, kiểm tra kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: I spent a good hour going over the sketches to see how the artist developed their final ideas.

vocab.meaning: kết thúc (một trải nghiệm, một chuyến đi)
vocab.example: We decided to finish off our gallery visit with a coffee in the museum's charming courtyard.
